results.engine_gap: X-target spell (exile X target permanents) + delayed-trigger return at next end step
results.notes: X-target counts and delayed end-step returns are both general engine gaps for resolve callbacks.

results.engine_gap: modal type-becoming (Citizen 1/1 hexproof OR Hero 3/4 flying+vigilance) until end of turn
results.notes: Layer-changing 'becomes a [subtype] with base P/T' effects aren't modeled by composable resolves; both modes need bespoke type/PT/keyword bundles.

results.engine_gap: graveyard targeting up to six cards with a 'different names' constraint
results.notes: Multi-target graveyard selection with a uniqueness predicate; needs interactive prompt and constraint validation.

Wired bespoke resolve: target opponent loses life equal to their creature count (dynamic LIFE_CHANGE), then OBJECT_DESTROYED for every creature on the battlefield. Auto-pattern can't read the controller's creature count from text.

results.engine_gap: modal: Date Night impulse-2 (exile top 2 + may-play one) OR Patrol Night (one or two creatures get +1/+0 + first strike)
results.notes: Date Night needs impulse exile + delayed-may-play; Patrol Night needs variable-number targeting with keyword grant. Modal fan-out requires per-mode bespoke resolves.
